what_it_does: Defines a small React placeholder component Stub({title, note}) that renders a screen title plus a muted, centered card reading 'Not implemented in this kit' with either a passed-in note or a default message explaining the screen would reuse the shell + soft-gold-panel patterns. Attaches it to window.Stub.
observations: Accepts two props: `title` (rendered as the cv-screen-title heading) and optional `note` (overrides the default explanatory text).
Default note text instructs: compose the screen from this kit's Sidebar + TopBar + sections.
All styling is inline via CSS custom properties (var(--bg-muted), var(--r-lg), var(--font-body), var(--accent-bronze)).
An uppercase, letter-spaced bronze 'Not implemented in this kit' eyebrow sits above the body text.
Module-as-global: window.Stub = Stub at the end.
standouts: It is self-documenting about how a real screen should be built ('compose the Sidebar + TopBar + sections from this kit').
conventions: Honest-placeholder convention: explicitly labels unbuilt surfaces rather than faking them, matching the design corpus 'no fiction' rule.
Token-driven inline styling and module-as-window-global export, consistent with sibling kit files.
notes: A reusable 'screen not built in this kit' placeholder card that names the title and points at the shell pattern to build it for real.
questions: Which screens in the platform kit are routed to Stub vs fully implemented?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the header comment says 'placeholder for screens that aren't fully built out' and the code is exactly that.
apparent_themes: Composability of a shared shell (Sidebar + TopBar + sections)
intention_signals: Provides a single honest stand-in for screens not yet built, keeping the kit navigable and explicit about what is and isn't implemented without depicting nonexistent functionality.
novelty: Its instructional default text doubles as in-kit guidance for how to flesh the screen out.
contribution: Contributes a reusable honest-placeholder primitive that labels unbuilt surfaces and documents the shell-composition recipe inline.
summary_for_embedding: A React placeholder component that renders a titled 'Not implemented in this kit' card with optional override text, exported on window.Stub.
intention_for_embedding: To stand in honestly for kit screens that are not yet built while pointing at the shell pattern needed to build them.
